description: Tools for searching vehicles, checking availability, and booking transportation in Cambodia (vans, buses, tuk-tuks, private cars). The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to arrange ground transport for users.

tools.name: list_vehicles
tools.description: Search and filter available transportation vehicles in Cambodia. Use this when the user needs transport between cities, a private car for sightseeing, a tuk-tuk for short trips, or a bus for budget travel.
tools.returns: Paginated list of vehicles with id, type, name, capacity, pricePerDayUsd, pricePerKmUsd, hasAc, hasWifi, ratingAverage

tools.name: get_vehicle_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific vehicle including specifications, photos, amenities, and pricing.
tools.returns: Full vehicle details including description, luggageCapacity, imageUrls, ratingCount, status

tools.name: check_vehicle_availability
tools.description: Check if a specific vehicle is available for the given date range. Always call this before creating a booking. Date range max 90 days.

from.description: Start date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

to.description: End date of the desired booking (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: create_transportation_booking
tools.description: Book a vehicle for the user with a 15-minute hold. Use after confirming availability and user consent. Requires pickup and dropoff locations. Supports Idempotency-Key header.

Idempotency-Key.description: Optional unique key to prevent duplicate bookings on retry

pickupLocation.description: Pickup address or location name (max 500 chars)

dropoffLocation.description: Drop-off address or location name (max 500 chars)

stops.description: Optional intermediate stops along the route

estimatedDistanceKm.description: Estimated trip distance in km (for per-km priced vehicles)

tools.returns: BookingDetail with id, reference, status (HOLD), totalUsd, expiresAt (15 min), items[]
